findings.summary: Pre-existing failure at baseline (verified via git stash on clean tree); unrelated to this change, not in CI.
findings.evidence: FAIL: OCaml: effects-of exported_entry missing FieldAccess/HashTbl — identical on clean tree
findings.fix: Separate fix task; recorded in impl brief out-of-scope list.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Generated column functions.line_count hidden from pragma_table_info, so large_functions was silently omitted (FR-002 violation on main-schema DBs).
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: pragma_table_info: 0 rows for line_count; pragma_table_xinfo: 1 row; count(line_count>50)=14 on self-index
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: all metrics-branch column probes switched to pragma_table_xinfo; baseline regenerated (now includes large_functions:14); explanatory comment added.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: CI compared against the PR's own baseline copy — a PR could loosen metrics-baseline.json to hide a regression without a waiver.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: on PRs the baseline is pinned to origin/$GITHUB_BASE_REF via git show, with fallback when absent (ADR 002 pattern).

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Template ended in a comment block; a bare waiver appended at EOF inherited the header as its 'reason', defeating the mandatory-reason rule.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: repro: template + 'large_functions <= 12' appended → accepted with header text as Reason
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: template now ends with a blank line (parser clears pending comments); regression test test_template_bare_append_rejected added; end-to-end repro now exits 1.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: metrics -o FILE silently ignored extra trailing arguments instead of exit 2.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: third positional rejected with usage message, exit 2; verified.

notes: Primary reviewer + spec-compliance run inline (subagent budget exhausted); FR-001..020 swept — all satisfied post-fix. Cross-runtime pass: codex exec (read-only sandbox), 4 findings, all fixed and re-verified. 26 Alcotest cases green, selftest-contract/load green, AC-7 dogfood re-verified with the regenerated baseline (5 tracked metrics unchanged).
